questionHtml: Predict, giving a reason, the major product of reaction between but-1-ene and steam.
markschemeHtml:
CH3CH2CH(OH)CH3 ✔

«secondary» carbocation/CH3CH2CH+CH3 more stable ✔

 

Do not accept “Markovnikov’s rule” without reference to carbocation stability.

meta.title: Predict, giving a reason, the major product of reaction between but-1-ene and steam.
